instruction: Write a FreeMarker recursive macro `renderSiteMap` that walks a tree of `nodes` (maps with `url`, `label`, optional `children`), stopping recursion at `maxDepth`. Render nested ul elements. Escape labels and URLs.
code:
<#-- Macro: renderSiteMap(nodes, depth=0, maxDepth=3) --> <#macro renderSiteMap nodes depth=0 maxDepth=3> <#if depth >= maxDepth> <#return>
    <#list nodes![] as node>
  • ${node.label?html} <#if node.children?has_content> <@renderSiteMap nodes=node.children depth=depth + 1 maxDepth=maxDepth />
